title: Jang Li-Li

{{Quote|Jang lived in service, however misguided, and acted by the star of her principles, however incomplete. By that judging, how many lives are better?|Count Dooku|<ref name="DR" />}}
'''Jang Li-Li''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In her youth, she was [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] by many [[Jedi Master/Legends|Masters]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] being one of them. Li-Li [[Death/Legends|died]] when her [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] was destroyed by the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]]-allied [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]], who later scoured the debris and found Li-Li's severed [[Limb/Legends|hand]] still clutching her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber's]] charred handle. Ventress took Li-Li's remains and [[Jang Li Li's lightsaber|lightsaber]] to [[Count/Legends|Count]] Dooku, the [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]] of the Confederacy. Dooku mourned her passing and sent Li-Li's lightsaber to [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] with a concealed [[Holorecorder/Legends|holorecorder]]. In the [[holograph]]ic message, Dooku asked to meet with Yoda on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] to discuss a ceasefire to the war.

==Biography==
===Early life===
{{Quote|Master, Master, I'm making rainbows!|Jang Li-Li to Yoda|<ref name="DR" />}}
The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Jang Li-Li was a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who lived during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. She underwent [[Jedi training/Legends|training]] in the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] in her youth.<ref name="DR" /> She was one of the one of the many students [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] helped train as a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]].<ref name="TCSWE: Li-Li, Jang" /> At some point in her studies in the temple, Li-Li became good friends with fellow Jedi trainee [[Politrix]].<ref name="DR" />

Her first assigned responsibility as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was a [[Mission to Sevarcos II|diplomatic mission]] to [[Sevarcos II|Sevarcos]], for which she began by seeking advice from her mentor, Dooku—considered to be one of the strongest and wisest Jedi of the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Order]]—before going. Dooku thought of her as a beautiful young woman with a lot of potential, someone who would do well in life.<ref name="DR" />

===The Clone Wars===
{{Quote|There wasn't much left of the ship, Master. The Force was strong, and I hit the reactor chamber with my first shot.|Asajj Ventress, on Li-Li's starfighter|<ref name="DR" />}}
[[File:Asajjventressheadshot-obsession.jpg|thumb|right|210px|Asajj Ventress, the Dark Jedi who killed Jang Li-Li]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the Jedi were tasked with leading the [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], and Li-Li served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]]. Shortly before leaving the Temple on a mission, Li-Li shared kitchen duties with her colleague, [[Maks Leem]].<ref name="DR" /> Sometime in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="NEC" /> Li-Li was flying her [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] in [[Realspace/Legends|deep-space]] when her ship's reactor chamber was shot by [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederate]]-allied [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Asajj Ventress/Legends|Asajj Ventress]] from her personal [[Ginivex-class starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Last Call (Ginivex-class)|''Last Call'']], causing it to explode and [[Death/Legends|kill]] Li-Li.<ref name="DR" />

Seeking to collect a trophy from what would be the sixteenth Jedi she had killed, Ventress spent [[Standard hour/Legends|hours]] searching the debris field and found Li-Li's severed [[Limb/Legends|hand]] clutching her partially destroyed [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] handle. Ventress took the hand and lightsaber to [[Count/Legends|Count]] Dooku, who was the leader of the Confederacy. He found himself mournful of her death, remarking that many lives were made better because Li-Li lived her life in service. Packing the remains of [[Jang Li Li's lightsaber|Li-Li's lightsaber]] inside an [[incendiary packet]], Dooku sent a [[Troxan]] [[Unidentified Troxan diplomat|diplomat]] to personally deliver the packet to the Jedi Order's [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]], Yoda.<ref name="DR" />

Arriving on Coruscant, the Troxan diplomat was barred entry to the temple by the assigned [[Youngling/Legends|youngling]], [[Whie Malreaux/Legends|Whie Malreaux]], on sentry duty. Malreaux diffused the standoff by calling for his Master, Leem, who used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to calm the agitated diplomat and assured him that she would deliver the packet herself. She found the Grand Master meditating in the [[Room of a Thousand Fountains/Legends|Room of a Thousand Fountains]], and when Yoda opened the packet, he recognized Li-Li's lightsaber and was saddened by her passing. Leem herself wished that Li-Li became one with the Force where she could be happy, safe and free.<ref name="DR" />

After Leem left the room, Yoda activated the lightsaber, prompting a [[Holorecorder/Legends|holorecording]] of Dooku to appear, asking his former Master to meet with him on the planet [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] to discuss a ceasefire to the war. Contemplating Dooku's offer, Yoda went back to his meditation, and as he sank deeper into the Force, one of his memories was of an eight-year-old Li-Li, gleefully creating rainbows in the room by puffing water with her mister.<ref name="DR" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|The Council was sending her on her first diplomatic mission…to Sevarcos, I think it was. She came to ask my advice. She had striking eyes, very gray and steady.|Count Dooku|<ref name="DR" />}}
Dooku remembered Jang Li-Li as an attractive young woman with distinctive and steady [[Color/Legends|gray]] eyes. When she was young, Li-Li had a carefree attitude, and was excited and happy upon creating rainbows using a plant mister. Moments before her death, Li-Li's first reaction was to grab her lightsaber. Ventress later commented on how unusual this was and attributed it to the Jedi's instinctive habit.<ref name="DR" />

Jang Li-Li also had a sense of humor. On her last stay at the Temple, she was assigned to kitchen duty with Jedi Maks Leem. While picking vegetables for the evening dinner, Li-Li made light of their duty by jokingly asking Leem whether shelling [[Antarian pea]]s [[Telekinesis/Legends|using]] the Force would be considered an abuse of power.<ref name="DR" />

==Powers and abilities==
{{Quote|I remember thinking she would do well.|Count Dooku, on Jang Li-Li's first mission on her own|<ref name="DR" />}}
Trained as a Jedi since her youth at the Jedi Temple on Coruscant, Jang Li-Li was fully capable of utilizing the Force. Even on her first diplomatic mission, she made an impression on Dooku, who at the time was considered one of the most exceptional Jedi in existence. He believed that Li-Li had great potential and would do well as a Jedi. Li-Li was also an accomplished [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="DR" />

==Equipment==
{{Quote|Jang Li-Li. All that is left of her, this is.|Yoda, upon receiving Jang Li-Li's lightsaber|<ref name="DR" />}}
After becoming a Jedi Knight, Jang Li-Li crafted a lightsaber containing a blue [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]]. When she died, Dooku modified her partially destroyed lightsaber by outfitting it with a holorecorder to deliver a private message to Yoda.<ref name="DR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Jang Li-Li was a character created by author [[Sean Stewart]] for the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''. In the novel, Dooku remembered Li-Li as having gray eyes, while Maks Leem recalled that she had almond-colored eyes.<ref name="DR" />

According to Li-Li's entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], she accompanied Jedi Master [[Jai Maruk]] on a mission to Vjun to investigate the buildup of Separatist forces in the [[Nuiri sector/Legends|sector]].<ref name="TCSWE: Li-Li, Jang" /> In the novel, however, Maruk's debriefing report to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] stated that he was alone in his mission. This article assumes that the novel version is correct, since Li-Li's encyclopedia entry also stated that she was captured by Asajj Ventress and later engaged the Dark Jedi in single combat, whereas in the novel, only Maruk [[Duel on Vjun (Clone Wars)|fought]] and was later captured by Ventress, and Li-Li was killed when Ventress vaporized her ship.<ref name="DR" />
